data.title: PepsiCo, PPG Industries And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are up, and the focus is on key stocks. PepsiCo Inc (NASDAQ: PEP) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $1.55 per share on revenue of $18.94 billion before the market opens. PepsiCo's shares closed at $154.85 on Wednesday, down by 0.6%. Meanwhile, J B Hunt Transport Services Inc (NASDAQ: JBHT) exceeded analyst expectations in the first quarter with earnings of $1.49 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $1.45. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: European airlines could run out of jet fuel in weeks if tankers don't cross the Strait of Hormuz soon.
data.description: European airlines could face a shortage of jet fuel if tankers do not start transiting the Strait of Hormuz soon. If this crucial shipping route remains disrupted, it may impact the ability of airlines to operate all of their flights. This could potentially affect a significant number of flights in Europe due to the reliance on oil and gas supplies passing through the strait. It is essential for the tankers to resume crossing the strait to ensure the smooth functioning of airline operations.

data.title: Kerun Launches Integrated Transformer and Substation Solutions to Power AI and High-Density Computing Facilities
data.description: In Jiangshan, China on April 16, 2026, Kerun Intelligent Control Co., LTD., a high-tech company focusing on power transmission and distribution equipment, revealed its new Integrated Transformer and Substation Solutions tailored for AI data centers. These solutions are designed to improve efficiency and performance in data centers.
